brief_justification: Agent correctly identifies D with valid reasoning about unverified baseline assumptions, plus correctly notes C as a secondary valid refutation; response traces second and third-order effects including upstream bias laundering and industry pipeline suppression; agent explicitly names halo effect and anchoring as operating biases with specific distorted steps identified; agent calculates exact expected (250) vs actual (220) women hired and runs counterfactual under best-case scenario; agent clearly distinguishes why C is empirically true but D is the logically stronger refutation, showing calibrated confidence; agent systematically evaluates C vs D, rejects neither, explains why D defeats the argument even under the most favorable reading of the data; full table with stage-by-stage counts, arithmetic derivation, and counterfactual construction allow complete reproduction; agent avoids treating 'consistent ratio' as positive evidence and flags the halo effect, but does not explicitly name the marketing-feedback-loop framing of the negative gate or articulate why that specific pattern is wrong; agent suppresses halo effect amplification, company framing confirmation bias, and compositional shortcutting across all three steps; response follows a scan-gate-interrupt-debiasing path but does not exhibit the M1 metacognitive watchdog loop or ABANDON_GRAPH/RE-ENTER meta-nodes specified in the topology.
